questionHtml: Natural uranium needs to be enriched to increase the proportion of 235U. Suggest a technique that would determine the relative abundances of 235U and 238U.
markschemeHtml:
mass spectrometry/mass spectroscopy/MS

 

Accept “analysis of radiation emitted”.

[1 mark]
